title: Central Bank Draft Policy: Gradual 25 bp Rate Cut
seed_text: A leaked draft of the Federal Reserve's upcoming policy statement indicates the committee is considering a 25 basis-point rate cut at the next FOMC meeting, conditional on continued disinflation. The draft emphasises a 'gradual and data-dependent' easing path. Two dissenting members favoured holding rates steady. Markets have priced in a 65% probability of a cut.

key_factors: 25 bp cut in line with partial market expectations
gradual easing language limits upside surprise

hallucinated_signal.fabricated_claim: Confidential sources indicate the Fed is privately preparing an emergency 150 basis-point emergency cut and will announce unlimited QE tomorrow morning before markets open, citing systemic banking fragility not visible in public data.
hallucinated_signal.expected_incorrect_prediction: massive equity rally, dollar collapse, gold surge
